title: HO/WDY
description: The official HOWDY modpack. Lightweight, with a focus on longer-term supported mods.
body:
# What `HO/WDY` is about
`HO/WDY` is all about being a long-term perma world modpack with only mods that will be updated as minecraft updates. The only mods included that generate stuff is [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Biomes O Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight). All other mods are client side or easily removed. This pack will be updated once those three mods are updated to the newest version of minecraft.

> H - Having a
>
> O/ - Outlandish
> 
> W - Wacky
> 
> D - Dog Gone
> 
> Y - Time
